name: Client Workspace Reference Pattern And SharePoint Command Center Shape

site.title: Guided AI Labs
site.purpose: AI-first operating command center and teachable client workspace reference pattern.

principle: Pages route humans; Lists hold operating state; libraries hold files and evidence; permissions create safety; navigation creates usability.

pages.title: How To Use This Workspace
pages.role: Onboarding page for a business partner or trusted collaborator.

pages.title: Intake
pages.role: Front door for opportunities, client discovery, support, feedback, and improvement requests.

pages.title: Decisions
pages.role: Durable memory for governance, client scope, delivery commitments, automation boundaries, and exceptions.

pages.title: Client Workspace Pattern
pages.role: Stage 8 reference page for how Guided AI Labs structures client work.

pages.title: Methods And IP
pages.role: Reusable delivery knowledge without mixing it into client-owned records.

pages.title: AI And Automation Governance
pages.role: Controlled surface for agents, automations, tool permissions, app grants, and human approval rules.

nextLists.title: Client Workspace Register
nextLists.purpose: Client/partner workspace model, tenant ownership, status, access posture, and handoff state.

nextLists.title: Handoff Packet Register
nextLists.purpose: Workspace handoff owner, links, training state, closeout/export path, and next review date.

nextLists.title: Tool Permission Review
nextLists.purpose: App grants, agent scopes, risky permissions, workflow owner, and review cadence.
nextLists.stage: Stage 8 second wave after governance permissions are confirmed

nextLists.title: Exception Register
nextLists.purpose: Approved deviations with owner, expiry, review date, and closure path.

libraryRoles.title: Published Methods
libraryRoles.purpose: Approved templates, playbooks, training aids, and public-safe examples.

libraryRoles.title: Delivery Working Documents
libraryRoles.purpose: Active internal delivery files and supporting material.

libraryRoles.title: Restricted Build Evidence
libraryRoles.purpose: App, agent, automation specs, sensitive evidence, prompt/integration risk notes.

libraryRoles.title: Client Handoff Packets
libraryRoles.purpose: Handoff-ready exports, guides, ownership notes, and review packets.

liveChangeGates: Storing sensitive AI/automation details in broadly readable areas
